## Description
A clear description of the bug.

## Environment
- **Device/Emulator**: (e.g., Pixel 6, Android 13)
- **Architecture**: (arm64-v8a / armeabi-v7a)
- **Unity Version** (of target app): (e.g., 2022.3.x)
- **NDK Version**: (e.g., 25.2)

## Steps to Reproduce
1. Build the project
2. Load into target application
3. ...

## Expected Behavior
What you expected to happen.

## Actual Behavior
What actually happened.

Paste relevant logcat logs here (filter by "UnityRenderer" tag)

Paste the CRASH backtrace from logcat here
